description: A traveler needs to book a one-way flight from New York (JFK) to Los Angeles (LAX).

nodes.task_description: Search for available one-way flights from JFK to LAX on the specified date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent returns a list of available flights with times and prices.

nodes.task_description: Select the flight chosen by the customer and confirm the total price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the selection and total cost.

nodes.task_description: Complete the booking with the traveler's details and issue the e-ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the flight and provides a booking reference.
